seoTitle: Macgregor vs Mawson — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Macgregor and Mawson. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Macgregor and Mawson.
heading: Macgregor vs Mawson — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Macgregor, Australian Capital Territory and Mawson, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Macgregor has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Mawson (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Macgregor or Mawson safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Macgregor has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Mawson scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Macgregor scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Mawson scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Macgregor or Mawson?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Macgregor has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
